title: Senior SEO Specialist at Miniklub South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Senior SEO Specialist at Miniklub South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Miniklub South Asia Partners. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About Miniklub South Asia Partners:
Miniklub South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Miniklub South Asia Partners!
